sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this SRS defines functional, performance, interface, safety, security, and regulatory requirements for {device_name_model} and derives from system inputs in {ref:RD-002} and risk controls in {ref:RD-007}.

sections.title: 2. Scope
sections.content: Applies to all software requirements for {device_name_model} traced to architecture {ref:SW-003} and verified through {ref:SW-005}, {ref:SW-006}, {ref:SW-007}.

sections.title: 3. Requirement Categories (IEC 62304 §5.2.2)
clauses: 3.3 Interfaces between software and other systems
3.5 Security requirements (authentication, authorisation, audit, data integrity, confidentiality)
sections.section_prompt: For each category provide 1–2 sentences describing how it applies to {device_name_model}. Note any categories not applicable with justification.

sections.title: 4. Software Requirements Register
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 15–22 software requirements for {device_name_model} (Class {software_safety_class}) covering all categories above. IDs SR-001 sequential. Priority Must/Should. Traced From cites REQ-xxx from {ref:RD-002} or HZ-xxx risk control from {ref:RD-007}. Verification one of Unit Test, Integration Test, System Test, Inspection, Analysis. Return JSON array.
